description_long: This object consists of a group of five distinct swords, each with unique blade shapes and handle designs, arranged upright in a row. The central sword is the largest, featuring a broad, double-edged blade, a prominent gold crossguard with circular side rings, and a dark handle capped with a rounded pommel. Flanking it are two medium-length swords: one with a straight blade and a simple crossguard, and another with a slightly ornate hilt and a jewel-like pommel. On the far left is a slender, dark sword with a twisted handle and a small, rounded guard, while the far right sword has a gently curved blade and a knuckle guard, reminiscent of a saber. The materials appear to be primarily metal for the blades and guards, with some handles wrapped or decorated in darker materials. The overall appearance suggests a collection of historical or fantasy-inspired swords, each with distinct functional and decorative features.
description: A set of five visually distinct swords, each with unique blade shapes, guards, and handle designs, arranged upright in a row.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all five swords side by side, highlighting their varying blade shapes, guard styles, and handle designs.
description_view_1: Side view focused on the central sword, revealing the thickness of the blades and the circular side rings of the central guard.
description_view_2: Rear view of the swords, displaying the backs of the handles and the curvature of the rightmost blade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again centered on the main sword, showing the profile of the guards and the handles' contours.
attribute_blade_type: mixed: straight double-edged, straight single-edged, curved single-edged
attribute_handle_design: varied: wrapped, contoured, straight, some with pommels, one with a knuckle guard, some with decorative elements
attribute_ornamentation: decorative guards, colored pommels, jewel-like accents, some engraved patterns
